untranslatable_reason: Signal requires 'price > 20-day MA by at least 5%' and 'confirm uptrend for 10+ consecutive days' — the 5% relative threshold and multi-day consecutive confirmation logic cannot be expressed with allowed operators and indicators. ADX > 25 used as proxy for trend confirmation, but true 10-day consecutive uptrend check requires custom logic outside standard indicators.
translation_notes: Translated 'momentum and strength' to ADX > 25 (trend strength). Price >= $15 is explicit. Volume check uses vol_ratio_20 as proxy for volume above 50-day average. Exit conditions inferred from moving average crossover (reversal signal) and pivot support break. Stop loss set to 8% as specified. Target regime set to TRENDING_UP based on momentum/strength focus.
